final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID card for ByteDance (字节跳动), front and back views, photorealistic product shot.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, corporate ID card mockup with real-world depth and shadow
Composition: flat-lay top-down view showing both front and back sides of the ID card side by side, slight rotation for natural presentation, soft shadow beneath
Subject: standard PVC employee badge with rounded corners, visible card thickness edge, realistic lanyard hole, subtle surface reflections
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral surface (light gray desk or white paper), minimal distraction, shallow depth keeping cards sharp
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio light from upper left, gentle gradient across card surface, professional corporate atmosphere
Color palette: white card base with ByteDance blue (#3C8CFF) as primary accent, black text, subtle gray tones for secondary elements
Materials/textures: matte laminated PVC surface with slight gloss at light angles, realistic ink printing texture, subtle embossed effect on logo area
Text (verbatim): "字节跳动"
Constraints: both front and back must be visible in one frame; front shows photo placeholder, name, department, employee number; back shows company logo and barcode/QR area
Avoid: flat vector illustration style, cartoon rendering, watermark, over-saturated colors, plastic toy appearance, missing back side
